allow: Bash(xcodebuild -project Lyne.xcodeproj -scheme Lyne -sdk iphonesimulator -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 17 Pro' -configuration Debug build)
Bash(osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to tell process "Simulator" *)

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); s=d.get\('Services',[]\); print\('Stop',d.get\('BusStopCode'\),'| services:',len\(s\)\); [print\(' ',x['ServiceNo'],'->',x['NextBus'].get\('EstimatedArrival'\),'Load',x['NextBus'].get\('Load'\),'Type',x['NextBus'].get\('Type'\)\) for x in s[:5]]")
